_comment: Curated known-issue registry shipped with gitplugins (Phase 7). Seeded into glpi_plugin_gitplugins_known_issues on install under source 'builtin'; refreshable from the convergent catalog (Phase 10). kind ∈ conflict|advisory|min_peer. version_range/peer_range use whitespace-AND comparators (>=,<=,>,<,=,!=) or 'A - B' hyphen ranges; empty = any.

issues.message: geninventorynumber hooks pre_item_update on assets and can revert fields (e.g. otherserial) written by native GLPI inventory, 500-ing NetInventory. Verify precedence before enabling alongside native inventory.
geninventorynumber and glpiinventory both mutate asset fields on update; running them together has caused inventory import failures. Pin field ownership or disable one.
